sglang.title: Support sm90 Int8 gemm
sglang.author: ispobock
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Follow-up of #2752. Support sm90 Int8 GEMM implementation with cutlass 3.x for w8a8 int8 quantization.
N = 4096, K = 8192
   batch_size  vllm int8 gemm  sgl-kernel int8 gemm
0         1.0    2.680153e+03          2.779550e+03
1        16.0    4.315805e+04          4.453178e+04
2        32

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove redundant TypeVar from base model
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: The TypeVar related to HF config is unused because we now use VllmConfig.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix mm_limits access for merged multi-modal processor
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
FIX #12245
Tested locally using VLLM_USE_V1=1 vllm serve Qwen/Qwen2-VL-7B-Instruct --tensor-parallel-size 2. Before this PR, running this command fails in the same way as the linked issue.

vllm.title: [torch.compile] transparent compilation with more logging
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
In preparation for torch.compile documentation, I added the following logging information:

which function we are compiling:

INFO 01-20 22:10:00 decorators.py:201] Start compiling function <code object forward at 0x7f6ea4f85580, file "/data/youkaichao/vllm/vllm/model_executor/models/llama.py", line

vllm.title: [V1][Bugfix] Fix data item ordering in mixed-modality inference
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Due to v1 re-arch and design of get_input_embeddings being not modality-aware, the order of embeddings in encoder_outputs needs to match the order of multimodal inputs (MultiModalKwargs) in the current batch.
However, batching MultiModalKwargs when there are multiple modalities in the same batch wil

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Remove comments re: pytorch for outlines + compressed-tensors dependencies
vllm.author: tdoublep
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
These comments cause both packages to be stripped out when running use_existing_torch.py, but the packages are required dependencies.
See discussion on #12255
cc @youkaichao

vllm.title: [Platform] improve platforms getattr
vllm.author: MengqingCao
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Improve platforms __getattr__ func, raise AttributeError instead of reporting KeyError when there is no attribute named name

vllm.title: [ci/build] add nightly torch for test
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
bump the version of nightly pytorch for testing.
pytorch cuda 12.4 does not release arm64 wheels anymore, so we need to use cuda 12.6 wheels. fortunately, that version of pytorch also works for cuda 12.4 runtime.
locally tested it works.

vllm.title: [Bugfix] fix race condition that leads to wrong order of token returned
vllm.author: joennlae
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The setup function is called multiple times (every 5 seconds) during the API server's startup. The longer the startup time (generally for larger models), the more consumers are contending for the output. This can lead to a race condition where the order of the answer token is wrong.
Here is where th

vllm.title: [Kernel] fix moe_align_block_size error condition
vllm.author: jinzhen-lin

vllm.title: [v1][stats][1/n] Add RequestStatsUpdate and RequestStats types
vllm.author: rickyyx
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds the basic data structures to capture request stats change and their lifecycle transitions.
Intended usage in follow-up PRs

The RequestStatsUpdate would be recorded on both the engine core as well as the frontend engine (async multiprocess architecture) process as request goes through v

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Multi-sequence broken
vllm.author: andylolu2
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fixes the bugs introduced in #9569

SequenceGroup does not necessarily contain only one sequence (e.g. when n > 1), so many of the optimisations don't make sense.
Currently the seed is duplicated across all completions, so when we have n > 1 with seed set, all completions give the same output.
Curre

vllm.title: [Misc] Remove experimental dep from tracing.py
vllm.author: codefromthecrypt
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Currently, the OpenTelemetry POC imports constants from a type that no longer exists. This copies the constants instead as is usually advised to prevent version locks.
This also finishes name conversion from llm -> gen_ai per upstream https://github.com/open-telemetry/semantic-conventions/blob/main/

vllm.title: [Misc] Set default backend to SDPA for get_vit_attn_backend
vllm.author: wangxiyuan
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Xformers works only on GPU, while torch SDPA  is more generic. This PR set the default attention backend to SDPA for qwen-vl, so that most non-GPU platform(especially out-of-tree ) can work by default with SDPA.

vllm.title: [Core] Free CPU pinned memory on environment cleanup
vllm.author: janimo
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When using pinned memory, such as with CPU offload, the physical RAM will not be freed on shutdown, only when the process exits or at some unknown time in the future. To permit subsequent runs not OOMing, we can free it using a call introduced in Pytorch 2.5.
vLLM depends on Pytorch 2.5 but I put in

vllm.title: [bugfix] moe tuning. rm is_navi()
vllm.author: divakar-amd
vllm.bodyExcerpt: fix for benchmark_moe.py which removes the erroneously pushed is_navi() check as part of this PR: #12049

vllm.title: [BUGFIX] When skip_tokenize_init and multistep are set, execution crashes
vllm.author: maleksan85
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Adding extra check into multistep, like for single step, for existence of detokenizer

vllm.title: [Documentation][AMD] Add information about prebuilt ROCm vLLM docker for perf validation purpose
vllm.author: hongxiayang
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Added information about prebuilt vLLM on ROCm docker for validation of performance on MI300x node.
This is to address the request from PR. We will close/cancel that PR after this is merged.

vllm.title: [VLM] Simplify post-processing of replacement info
vllm.author: DarkLight1337
vllm.bodyExcerpt: It is common to have extra tokens in the prompt replacement which are not sent to the vision encoder. This PR adds a PromptReplacementDetails class which is used to indicate which part of the replacement corresponds to placeholder feature tokens to be overwritten by embeddings from the vision encode

vllm.title: [ci/lint] Add back default arg for pre-commit
vllm.author: khluu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
From @hmellor : extra_args was updated in #12212 that overwrites default arg --all-files in https://github.com/pre-commit/action/blob/main/action.yml. This PR adds the default arg back along with the new extra args
Also reformatted some files to pass lint checks (since about 20 commits have not been

vllm.title: [Benchmark] More accurate TPOT calc in `benchmark_serving.py`
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Determining output token count by tokenizing output text is not very reliable, especially when there are special tokens and/or --ignore-eos is being used.

Change to use the number of output tokens reported in the usage stats.
Determine latency using time of last token rather than of last chunk to m

vllm.title: [core] separate builder init and builder prepare for each batch
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Right now we create the builder instance for every batch, and hence create the attention metadata builder instance for every batch, but we don't have some global information when we create the input for every batch.
When upgrading to flashinfer 0.2, see #11194 , the attention metadata builder needs

vllm.title: [Build] update requirements of no-device
vllm.author: MengqingCao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
When we install vLLM with no-device, use requirements-cpu.txt instead of requirements-cuda.txt to avoid downloading a lot of nv-related packages required by torch with cuda.
cc @youkaichao

vllm.title: [Core] Support fully transparent sleep mode
vllm.author: youkaichao
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
there is a strong need to put vllm in sleep mode (offload weight, discard kv cache), from rlhf community. see #10714 and #11638
I have implemented the core functionality in https://github.com/vllm-project/vllm_allocator_adaptor , and add the integration in this PR.
Currently, we support:

offload mo
